titleStmt.title: SII 18.166: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 166. (B.K. No. 111 of 1932-33.) HOMMARAḌI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken stone lying in the temple of Kalamēśvara.

summary.p: This badly damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of a Chālukya king. The details of the date are lost. The characters belong to 11th century A.D.

It mentions the Kadamba chief Maira. The genealogy of this chief found in this record is as follows: Chaṭṭu, his son Māvula and his son Kādamba-bhūpati. After him (probably his son) Satyāśraya, his son Maira. The other details of the record are lost.

The first two lines which apparently form a separate grant state that Mayūravarma (probably the same as Maira) made a grant of some taxes on the occasion of a solar eclipse on Sunday, Amāvāsyā of Śrāvaṇa in the cyclic year Prabhava. In the 11th century the given details of the date correspond regularly to A.D. 1087, August 1, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmanmayūravarmmadēvaṁ prabhavasaṁvatsarada srāvaṇadamavāseyādi tyavārasūryyagrahaṇa
rahāḷa neladeṟe kiṟudeṟe sahitaṁ namasyamāge dēvarige koṭṭaru Idanaḷidaṁ tapōdhanaruṁ kavi
stabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha ma
completely damaged
vara vijayarājya(ṁ)muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ baraṁ salu
yaṁ sētuhimācaḷēṁdranagaparyaṁtabaraṁ saptasaptatisiṁhāsanamāḷda viśrutaka
dēvakṣitipaṁ caṭṭunripaṁge māvulaṁ sutaṁ tatsūnu kādaṁbabhūpatiyaṁ tāta
daṁ satyāśrayōrbbīśvaraṁ . satyāśrayabhūpatigaṁ satyada kaṇi dēyi bara
nibhatējanadhikanudāttayaśaṁ mairabhūbhujaṁ vasumatiyoḷ . Inasu
ninā dhanadānadēḷgeyoḷ samanenalintununayanarttinivahakkanavarataṁ kuḍuva
levarinripara samūhade taleyaṁ bērvverasi kirttu mairugabhūpaṁ jaladalalē
nriparidircci ba[®du]kuvaroḷarē . Antenisi negaḻdu . svasti samadhigata paṁca
raṁ banavāsīpuravarēśvaraṁ dharaṇīdēvatārudraprasādōtpatti triḷōcanaka
taṁ saptisaptasiṁhāsana kādaṁbādhirājaṁ hayavatsarājaṁ kṣatriyapavitra
śrīvasīkaraṇaṁ kadaṁbarābharaṇaṁ vikrāṁtatuṁganayyana siṁga śrīmanmahā
banavāse pannirccāsirakkadhiparāgiyommoṟaḍiyoḷ sukhadina
śrīmaccāḷu siddhā
nimityamā
pūrbbakaṁ mā
kōṭi
guladiṁ baḍa The continuation is broken off.
Digital edition of SII 18.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
